fragileSubsystems.why: repeated data-loss history; length-heuristic merges, restore parity gaps
4-5k LOC; hooks after early returns risk render-order crashes
NaN coords crash react-native-svg; guard coverage uneven
SDK has no request timeout; bare calls defeat provider fallback

priorityNextRun: H2 tombstone/versioned sync (the only correct multi-device fix)
upgrade messages to real per-user auth
SSRF guard sweep of other proxies
rules: NaN into SVG = crash; use Number.isFinite not <=0
client timeout must exceed server cascade
restore must never let emptier blob clobber richer local
grow-mostly stores are EDITABLE not append-only — never id-union without tombstones (resurrects deletions)
